title: brain note add — --json success output
description: Deterministic Tier-1 ingest of a PRE-AUTHORED vault note that APPLIES immediately (#262) — no preview mode. Funnels through addNote: scan-before-persist (secret detection ⇒ exit 3, quarantined, nothing persisted), vault-reader frontmatter validation, id/alias/path collision refusal against the current projections, then broker Tier-1 CAS integration under the additions-only "note" scope (the commit may only ADD *.md files outside sources/). Unlike source add (immutable blob + manifest stub), the file itself lands at <dest>/<basename> on canonical as first-class vault content; it becomes projection-visible and retrievable after the next `db rebuild` + `index rebuild` (there is no ingest→index auto-hook yet — #60).

noteId.description: The note's frontmatter id (NOT a derived source-* id).

path.description: The vault-relative path the note landed at (<dest>/<input basename>).

contentHash.description: sha256:<hex> over the exact bytes installed.

canonicalSha.description: The canonical tip after the Tier-1 CAS installed the note.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Deterministic Tier-1 authored-note ingest; applies immediately.

args.name: <path>
args.description: Path to the authored markdown note to ingest.

flags.name: --dest <folder>
flags.description: Vault-relative folder the note lands in (never sources/).

sideEffects: writes the note file verbatim at <dest>/<basename> on an agent branch
integrates the note-add commit via broker Tier-1 CAS under scope "note" (advances canonical exactly one commit)
writes ledger rows + one terminal run.integrated audit-ref event via finalizeLedgerWrite
prohibitedEffects: no byte persists or transmits before the secret scan passes (scan-before-persist)
never modifies or deletes ANY existing vault content (broker-enforced additions-only scope)
never writes under sources/ (the capture-only namespace)

errorCodes.when: the note fails normalization, frontmatter validation, or collides with an existing id/alias/path
the secret scanner flagged the bytes; note quarantined, nothing persisted
ledger-writing is blocked pending a verified backup
a concurrent run holds the same --idempotency-key slot (key-accepting)
